results.title: JavaScript Course for Beginners – Your First Step to Web Development
results.reason: Mosh is highly praised in comments for a structured, slow-paced approach that covers variables, types, and functions perfectly for a first-time learner.
summary: Learn how to write your first lines of code
Understand how to use variables to store data
Master the basics of using functions and loops
Build a solid foundation for making websites work

results.title: JavaScript Visualized - Event Loop, Web APIs, (Micro)task Queue
results.reason: Exceptional visual animations explain the 'why' of the event loop, though the topic itself is slightly advanced for a day-one beginner.
summary: See how the browser handles many tasks at once
Learn how the computer decides what to run next
Understand how timers and web tools work together
Watch how code moves through a waiting line

results.title: How JavaScript Works 🔥& Execution Context | Namaste JavaScript Ep.1
results.reason: Highly acclaimed for explaining the internal engine mechanics, though beginners might find the 'Execution Context' concept abstract at first.
summary: Learn how the computer reads and runs your code
Understand the hidden box where everything happens
See how variables are stored before code runs
Discover why the order of code matters so much

results.title: JavaScript Visualized - Execution Contexts
results.reason: The visual representation of environment records is world-class, helping beginners visualize what is usually invisible in code.
summary: Watch how code creates a space to run
Learn how the computer tracks different code parts
See what happens when you call a new function
Understand how the system cleans up finished tasks

results.title: Learn JavaScript OBJECTS in 7 minutes! 🧍
results.reason: Bro Code is consistently cited for clear, no-nonsense explanations of specific features like Objects, making it great for modular learning.
summary: Learn how to group related data together easily
Understand how to give objects their own actions
See how to access information stored inside objects
Master creating real world items in your code
